programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Moveable Feast - Part 2: Will, Grace, Jack and Karen's Thanksgiving tour continues as the gang pay visits to the remaining family homes. (S4, ep 10)

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Stakin' Care of Business: Grace foolishly asks Karen for financial advice, while Jack tries to cement a new catchphrase and Will spots a familiar face... (S4, ep 11)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Thirty Minutes Over Tokyo: When the Simpson family find themselves stranded in Japan they are forced to take part in a shocking game show to win enough money to return home. (S10, ep 23)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Elementary School Musical: Glee stars Lea Michele, Cory Monteith and Amber Riley, plus Flight of the Conchords, guest star when Lisa goes to a performing arts camp. (S22, ep 1)

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: The Waterhole: As the dry season brings a band of gladiators to an African savannah watering hole, see a territory brawl and one honey badger's risky dance with a snake. (S1, ep 1)

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Lekio (Radio): The team turn to a retired NYPD bomb expert to solve the murder of a famous talk-show DJ. Guest starring Academy Award nominee James Caan. (S2, ep 18)

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: Number One with a Bullet: Katsumoto takes a job providing security for a chart-topping K-pop star. Higgins and Rick find themselves in peril. (S5, ep 3)

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Rocket Fuel: Hondo's mum tests the SWAT team leader and Chris weighs up a big decision. Tan's personal ties to a case emerge. (S2, ep 20)

programme.title: Police 24/7
programme.desc: A traffic stop for improper use of the centre lane turns into a chase and a 911 call leads to officers helping a woman who stabbed herself. Flashing images. (S2, ep 32)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Donnie Fatso: Following an incident involving recycling responsibilities and a bit of bribery, Homer goes undercover to bring down Fat Tony. Mad Men's Jon Hamm guest stars. (S22, ep 9)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Loan-A-Lisa: When Grampa divvys up his savings between the family, Marge buys a designer handbag, while Lisa donates her money to a charity to help young entrepreneurs. (S22, ep 2)

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Costume Contest: The office has a Halloween costume party, while Michael gets angry when Daryl goes over his head to corporate. (S7, ep 6)

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: Christening: Pam and Jim invite the office to celebrate Cece's christening, while Michael and Andy go on a church mission to Mexico. (S7, ep 7)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Love Is A Many Strangled Thing: Homer decides to enrol in a fathering enrichment class. Hollywood's Paul Rudd and former basketball champ Kareem Abdul Jabbar guest. (S22, ep 17)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Great Simpsina: Lisa becomes an apprentice to the Great Raymondo. Guest starring Martin Landau, Jack McBrayer and a trio of magicians, including David Copperfield. (S22, ep 18)

programme.title: An Idiot Abroad
programme.desc: Peru: Pilkington is sent on his final mission: to visit Machu Picchu in Peru. Along the way, Karl 'enjoys' an overnight stay in the Amazon jungle and meets some reformed cannibals. (7/8)

programme.title: Never Mind The Buzzcocks
programme.desc: Mel B, Alex James, Julian Clary and Sister Bliss join the regulars for the legendary pop culture panel show's revival, hosted by Greg Davies. (S4, ep 3)

programme.title: Tom Davis: Underdog
programme.desc: Tom Davis performs his sell-out stand-up show about life as the Underdog. He's gone from building sites to Blockbuster success but still gets told he's 'punching' by a waiter.

programme.title: Intelligence
programme.desc: Jerry is hailed as the hero as disaster is averted at the nuclear power plant - but threats still loom large. Meanwhile, the CySec mole is exposed. (S2, ep 2)

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Goodnight, Sweet Grimm: In the season finale, Nick takes on a terrifying new foe while investigating a series of violent assaults. (S2, ep 22)

programme.title: The Force: North East
programme.desc: Police are on high alert as rival football fans gather at Sunderland's Stadium of Light, while drunks turn violent after being thrown out of a club. (S6, ep 8)

programme.title: Road Wars
programme.desc: The Thames Valley Police provide a fascinating insight into car crime and its prevention. Plus, shocking video footage captures dangerous drivers in action. Strong language. (S3, ep 6)

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Lekio (Radio): The team turn to a retired NYPD bomb expert to solve the murder of a famous talk-show DJ. Guest starring Academy Award nominee James Caan. (S2, ep 18)

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: Rocket Fuel: Hondo's mum tests the SWAT team leader and Chris weighs up a big decision. Tan's personal ties to a case emerge. (S2, ep 20)

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: All in a Days Work: Officers deal with a driver who claims that his glasses case looks like a phone, a motorist causes mayhem on the roads and another refuses his fine politely. (S12, ep 1)

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Lead Shoes: A driver blames his shoes for his excessive speed, a night time dog walk turns into chaos and a mechanic gets into a world of trouble. (S12, ep 2)

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Pu'olo (The Package): Trouble brews when Chin-Ho shares some shocking news with McGarrett about Joe. Meanwhile, Danno plays midwife to his ex-wife. (S2, ep 14)

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: Mai Ka Wa Kahiko (Out of the Past): Danno receives an unpleasant blast from the past when he's reunited with an ex-partner and dirty cop he helped put away. (S2, ep 15)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moneybart: When Lisa signs up to coach Bart's baseball team, the pair discover that siblings and sport don't mix... Watch out for Banksy's unique title sequence too. (S22, ep 3)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa Simpson This Isn't Your Life: Lisa decides that she doesn't want to end up like her mum, Marge. Plus, dethroning Nelson, Bart becomes the playground's reigning bully. (S22, ep 5)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Fool Monty: Mr Burns is given just six weeks to live and, when an incident leaves the OAP without his memory, Springfield's residents decide to exact their revenge... (S22, ep 6)

programme.title: FILM: The Secret Garden
programme.desc: Unlock your imagination as a young orphan discovers a magical garden when she's sent to live on her uncle's estate. Colin Firth stars. (2020)(100 mins)

programme.title: Live WSL: Brighton v Man City
programme.desc: Closing in on a first Barclays WSL title in 10 years, Manchester City travel to Brighton. Victory here for City and an Arsenal defeat midweek would see them become champions.

programme.title: Football's Funniest Moments
programme.desc: A look at the most hilarious moments from the beautiful game over the last few years, with contributions from the likes of Gary Neville and Chris Kamara.

programme.title: Gillette Soccer Sat: Live Scores
programme.desc: Stay up to speed with the afternoon's football up and down the country as goals go in and updates arrive in the studio from around the grounds.

programme.title: Agatha Raisin
programme.desc: As The Pig Turns: To take her mind off her breakup, Agatha and the gang visit a fayre. But it's not long before the innocuous event becomes a crime scene. (S3, ep 4)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: How Munched Is That Birdie In The Window: Things aren't looking good for Santa's Little Helper after an incident involving a pigeon. Oscar winner Rachel Weisz guest stars. (S22, ep 7)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Donnie Fatso: Following an incident involving recycling responsibilities and a bit of bribery, Homer goes undercover to bring down Fat Tony. Mad Men's Jon Hamm guest stars. (S22, ep 9)

programme.title: The Italian Job (2003)
programme.desc: A gang of double-crossed thieves plan to cause a monumental traffic jam in a bid to reclaim their loot. Starring Mark Wahlberg and Ed Norton. (2003)(106mins)

programme.title: New: Saturday Night Live UK
programme.desc: Nicola Coughlan hosts as the Foo Fighters perform. Topical sketches, big laughs and razor-sharp satire take over the stage in this bold British take on the iconic show. (S1, ep 5)

programme.title: John Bishop 25 Tour: Live From Dublin
programme.desc: Marking 25 years since he first stepped onto the comedy stage, comedian, TV presenter and actor John Bishop embarks on his tenth stand-up tour to celebrate his career.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: The Last Straw. Atz Lee's return to the Hunter's Cabin is rudely interrupted, and he turns to a veteran homesteader for help. Plus, the Kilchers join forces to protect Shane's cabin. S5, Ep16

programme.title: Edge of Alaska
programme.desc: The Old Man On The Mountain. Neil is set to reopen the Motherlode mine - will a new arrival risk his empire? Jeremy starts a new venture, and an unlikely bond forms with two rivals. S2, Ep7

programme.title: Deadly Islands
programme.desc: Deadliest Moments. In a making-of special, Dave Salmoni reveals the hardship and dangers - not to mention broken equipment - he and his team had to battle during filming the series. S1, Ep6

programme.title: Speed Of Life
programme.desc: Predators Of The Southwest. Super slow motion goes beyond the limit of the human eye to capture a Harris hawk's attack on a partridge and witness a sidewinder's venomous strike. S1, Ep1

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Meditating Maple. Pete finds the perfect treehouse spot for a couple seeking a meditation space. 20-feet up, in a twisting pair of maples, the team creates an energy-infused retreat. S3, Ep1

programme.title: Animal Cops Philadelphia
programme.desc: Cat Killer. A dog is brought in with its hair so matted it can hardly see, and a man is suspected of violence towards three cats. S12, Ep12

programme.title: Animal Cops Philadelphia
programme.desc: Horse Rescue. Officers from the Pennsylvania SPCA are horrified to discover a dead horse and thirteen others living in deplorable conditions at a farm in North Pennsylvania. S12, Ep13

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Reese The Ripper. George and Beth are prisoners in their own home due to their vicious kitty Reese. Reese is a cat version of Jack the Ripper and Beth is one of his choice targets. S5, Ep11

programme.title: Must Love Cats
programme.desc: John explores Japan's fascination with felines; visiting cat cafes, and meeting cat lovers who risk their lives to save pets left homeless by the earthquake and tsunami. S1, Ep10

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: Hunter Games. Wardens question a felon suspected of illegally hunting with a firearm. Meanwhile, a late-night shrimp boat search uncovers illegal fish. S6, Ep23

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Born To Run. Dr Jeff and Dr Petra work together to save a beloved pet husky's leg. Meanwhile, specialist Dr Baier has a scare during a routine treatment of pet pig Strawberry. S3, Ep5

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Shelter From The Storm. Dr Jeff and the team are on a time limit to treat an English bulldog who swallowed a rock. Plus, Hector gets a workout from some puppies in need. S3, Ep6

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Last Chance Rescue. Tia races to rescue four dogs from a rural shelter in Louisiana from euthanasia. Plus, Mariah and Toney give a scared, shy dog a shot at a forever home. S11, Ep12

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees
programme.desc: Unexpected Call. The team are faced with an emotional and physical challenge in the form of a severely under-nourished pit bull. Then, they have to rehabilitate a dog left in a shop. S11, Ep13

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego
programme.desc: Mkhaya Discovers Her Trunk. The youngest elephant at the park learns how to use her trunk. Plus, an Andean bear is ready to mate and Jeff searches for the elusive coast patch-nosed snake. S1, Ep8

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego
programme.desc: Miracle Calf. A white rhino is pregnant with a very special calf. Plus, Connor the bone-loving Malayan tiger has tooth trouble and the vets step in to help. S1, Ep9

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Off-The-Grid Getaway. Pete creates an off-the-grid escape that's all about peace, love, and treehouses. Once built, the owner adds a massive hammock in the trees. S7, Ep4

programme.title: Preposterous Pets
programme.desc: Mr. Lizardlover & Ratty Relatives. Meet the lizard obsessive who changed his name to Mr Lizard Lover and found fame taking photos of his scaly friends posing as humans. S1, Ep5

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: Cool Koalas And Elephant Calls. How do koalas keep cool in the Australian sun? How do elephants communicate when they are miles apart? Experts answer these questions! S1, Ep21

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: Cat Speech. What are cats trying to communicate to humans? Why have some of the world's cleverest monkeys turned to a life of crime? Experts answer these questions and more! S1, Ep22

programme.title: Lair of the Sawfish
programme.desc: Experts unravel the mystery behind one of the sea's weirdest creatures, the sawfish, from its evolution to its role in the marine ecosystem. Can they help prevent its extinction?

programme.title: Alaska: Surviving the Last Frontier
programme.desc: Back From the Wild. Four groups of intrepid adventurers abandon the convenience and technological trappings of modern living and attempt to survive the wilds of Alaska. S1, Ep8

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Tank This! To unwind after a build at the Minus 5 bar in Vegas, the duo decides it's time to have some fun. They sneak a cooler of snowballs into the warehouse for a full-on battle. S3, Ep17

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Betty White's Got An App For That. The boys travel to sunny California to install an animal-themed tank for Betty White. Next, they install a smart phone themed tank. S3, Ep18

programme.title: Yeh Hai Judgementâ€
programme.desc: Ashraf Ansari, a local resident of Mumbai, is taken into custody as a suspect for the bomb blast that shakes the entire city. He battles with the police and the corrupt system to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Kalyug Ka Pandav
programme.desc: A man falls in love with a woman, who unfortunately refuses to marry him due to a dark family secret. In response, his brothers devise a plan to unite the two lovers.

programme.title: Love Mocktail
programme.desc: After rescuing a woman, Adi reminisces about his love life and tells her about all the heartbreaks he endured in his quest to find his true love.

programme.title: Mera Karam Mera Dharam
programme.desc: Ajay, a businessman, provides funds to Sarjuprasad to develop his hometown. When he learns that the money has been misappropriated by Sarjuprasad, he resolves to set things right.

programme.title: Pyar Ki Kahani
programme.desc: Ram, a peon, forms a close friendship with a man named Ravi and values his opinion. However, he is shocked when Ravi disapproves of his fiancee and gets more upset when he learns the reason why.

programme.title: Ghatak
programme.desc: When Kashi visits a community with his father, he is shocked to see the torturous regime of Katya. He tries to oppose Katya, but ends up compromising the safety of his family and relatives.

programme.title: Insaniyat
programme.desc: In order to combat terrorism, Inspector Amar has to convince two local crime lords, divided by religion, to work together. He also learns that being an honest cop has its own price.

programme.title: Juaari
programme.desc: Vijay, a young man, resorts to gambling in order to free his lover, Anita, who is held captive by Sanga. He soon runs out of luck when he gets arrested.

programme.title: 7th Day
programme.desc: When two friends run into David, an IPS official, they reveal an unfortunate event that changed their lives. David helps them get out of the mess but he is not what he claims to be.

programme.title: Chalte Chalte
programme.desc: Geeta is admitted to a mental hospital after her lover passes away tragically. Later, she gains her senses, only to find him alive and in love with another woman.

programme.title: Love Mocktail 2
programme.desc: With the semblance of leading a normal life, Adi struggles with the loss of his wife, Nidhi. However, Sihi, a charming young woman, enters as a glimmer of hope when she commits to helping Adi.

programme.title: Jigri Dost
programme.desc: Shobha prepares to marry an advocate named Anand as arranged by her father. However, she secretly follows him one day and is shocked to see him in the arms of another woman.

programme.title: Yes Boss
programme.desc: Rahul's boss Siddharth is a womaniser who blackmails Rahul into helping him win over Seema. But Rahul ends up falling in love with Seema and is torn between his career aspirations and his sweetheart.

programme.title: Majaal
programme.desc: Vijay falls in love with Sadhana and marries her, but on several occasions, he is disrespected by his in-laws. Frustrated, he loses interest in his married life.

programme.title: Keemat
programme.desc: Two crooks accidentally kill a man and decide to inform his parents about the bad news. However, once they meet the family, they end up lying to them.

programme.title: Gurudev
programme.desc: Inspector Dev Kumar has to choose between arresting his childhood friend Guru's father, who is a notorious criminal, and his integrity.
